title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 620.1007 - Annual report to whom
text:
620.1007.  Annual report to whom. — The director shall annually prepare and submit to the department, the governor and to the general assembly a report on the activities and financial expenditures of the Missouri small business development centers program for the year.
(L. 1992 S.B. 661 & 620 § 5)
